option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: Deploy Backend to Vercel
on: push: branches: - development - staging - production workflow_dispatch:
jobs: deploy: runs-on: ubuntu-latest environment: ${{ github.ref_name }} env: VERCEL_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN != '' && secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN || vars.VERCEL_TOKEN }} VERCEL_ORG_ID: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID != '' && secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID || vars.VERCEL_ORG_ID }} VERCEL_PROJECT_ID: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID != '' && secrets.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID || vars.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID }} defaults: run: shell: bash
steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Setup Node.js uses: actions/setup-node@v4 with: node-version: 20 cache: npm cache-dependency-path: package-lock.json
- name: Install dependencies run: npm ci
- name: Prepare static frontend for backend deploy run: | mkdir -p public cp index.html public/index.html
- name: Install Vercel CLI run: npm install --global vercel@latest
- name: Validate Vercel credentials run: | if [ -z "$VERCEL_TOKEN" ]; then echo "Missing VERCEL_TOKEN in environment secret/variable for branch: ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" >&2 exit 1 fi if [ -z "$VERCEL_ORG_ID" ]; then echo "Missing VERCEL_ORG_ID in environment secret/variable for branch: ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" >&2 exit 1 fi if [ -z "$VERCEL_PROJECT_ID" ]; then echo "Missing VERCEL_PROJECT_ID in environment secret/variable for branch: ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" >&2 exit 1 fi
- name: Generate .env from GitHub Environment run: | cat > .env << 'EOF' PORT=3000 MONGO_URI=${{ vars.MONGO_URI != '' && vars.MONGO_URI || secrets.MONGO_URI }} EOF
- name: Pull Vercel project settings run: | if [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "production" ] || [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "development" ]; then TARGET_ENV="production" else TARGET_ENV="preview" fi vercel pull --yes --environment="$TARGET_ENV" --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN"
- name: Build run: | if [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "production" ] || [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "development" ]; then vercel build --prod --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN" else vercel build --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN" fi
- name: Deploy run: | if [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "production" ] || [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "development" ]; then DEPLOY_URL=$(vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN") else DEPLOY_URL=$(vercel deploy --prebuilt --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN") fi echo "Deployed URL: $DEPLOY_URL"

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Deploy Backend to Vercel
on: push: branches: - development - staging - production workflow_dispatch:
jobs: deploy: runs-on: ubuntu-latest environment: ${{ github.ref_name }} env: VERCEL_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN != '' && secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN || vars.VERCEL_TOKEN }} VERCEL_ORG_ID: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID != '' && secrets.VERCEL_ORG_ID || vars.VERCEL_ORG_ID }} VERCEL_PROJECT_ID: ${{ secrets.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID != '' && secrets.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID || vars.VERCEL_PROJECT_ID }} defaults: run: shell: bash
steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Setup Node.js uses: actions/setup-node@v4 with: node-version: 20 cache: npm cache-dependency-path: package-lock.json
- name: Install dependencies run: npm ci
- name: Prepare static frontend for backend deploy run: | mkdir -p public cp index.html public/index.html
- name: Install Vercel CLI run: npm install --global vercel@latest
- name: Validate Vercel credentials run: | if [ -z "$VERCEL_TOKEN" ]; then echo "Missing VERCEL_TOKEN in environment secret/variable for branch: ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" >&2 exit 1 fi if [ -z "$VERCEL_ORG_ID" ]; then echo "Missing VERCEL_ORG_ID in environment secret/variable for branch: ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" >&2 exit 1 fi if [ -z "$VERCEL_PROJECT_ID" ]; then echo "Missing VERCEL_PROJECT_ID in environment secret/variable for branch: ${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" >&2 exit 1 fi
- name: Generate .env from GitHub Environment env: MONGO_URI: ${{ secrets.MONGO_URI != '' && secrets.MONGO_URI || vars.MONGO_URI }} run: | printf 'PORT=3000\nMONGO_URI=%s\n' "$MONGO_URI" > .env
- name: Set MONGO_URI as Vercel environment variable env: MONGO_URI: ${{ secrets.MONGO_URI != '' && secrets.MONGO_URI || vars.MONGO_URI }} run: | if [ -z "$MONGO_URI" ]; then echo "MONGO_URI is empty — aborting" >&2 exit 1 fi if [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "production" ] || [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "development" ]; then TARGET_ENV_FLAGS="--environment=production" else TARGET_ENV_FLAGS="--environment=preview" fi # Remove existing value (ignore failure if not set) echo "$MONGO_URI" | vercel env rm MONGO_URI $TARGET_ENV_FLAGS --yes --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN" 2>/dev/null || true echo "$MONGO_URI" | vercel env add MONGO_URI $TARGET_ENV_FLAGS --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN"
- name: Pull Vercel project settings run: | if [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "production" ] || [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "development" ]; then TARGET_ENV="production" else TARGET_ENV="preview" fi vercel pull --yes --environment="$TARGET_ENV" --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN"
- name: Build run: | if [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "production" ] || [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "development" ]; then vercel build --prod --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN" else vercel build --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN" fi
- name: Deploy run: | if [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "production" ] || [ "${GITHUB_REF_NAME}" = "development" ]; then DEPLOY_URL=$(vercel deploy --prebuilt --prod --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN") else DEPLOY_URL=$(vercel deploy --prebuilt --token="$VERCEL_TOKEN") fi echo "Deployed URL: $DEPLOY_URL"

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
